title: Uragoga obovata
taxonomy: Uragoga obovata is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Uragoga, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Uragoga obovata is further supported by its characteristics, such as its leaf and flower morphology. The species is native to tropical regions of Africa, where it can be found growing in various habitats. Through its classification, Uragoga obovata is recognized as a distinct species within the Rubiaceae family.
